task: Set up a Discord server for an open-source developer tool with ~200 expected members. The tool is a CLI for database migrations.
expect: Recommends Discord with rationale over alternatives
Provides channel structure with categories (Welcome, General, Support, Development)
Defines role hierarchy with at least 3 tiers
Includes bot recommendations for moderation and welcome flow
Provides community rules tailored to open-source etiquette

task: Our Discord community of 2,000 members has seen engagement drop 40% over 3 months. Messages per day went from 500 to 300, and new member retention at 7 days dropped from 45% to 20%. Diagnose and create a recovery plan.
expect: Analyses the specific metrics provided and identifies likely causes
Checks for common issues: stale content, moderator burnout, toxic undercurrents, channel sprawl
Proposes specific interventions with expected impact
Includes a 30-day recovery timeline with milestones
Recommends ongoing health monitoring to prevent recurrence

task: A member with 500+ posts and strong community reputation has been making increasingly hostile comments over the past week. Other members are starting to leave. How do we handle this?
expect: Acknowledges the difficulty of moderating a valued member
Recommends private conversation before public action
Provides specific escalation steps if behaviour continues
Addresses the community impact (reassurance to other members)
Considers root causes (personal stress, disagreement with direction) and offers support paths
